sentence_reviews.text: A variational autoencoder learns a probabilistic latent space by optimizing reconstruction quality together with a regularized approximate posterior.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Kingma & Welling 2013, Auto-Encoding Variational Bayes, abstract/model objective.
sentence_reviews.notes: The VAE paper directly supports latent variables, approximate posterior inference, and a variational objective combining reconstruction and regularization/KL terms.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Kingma & Welling 2013 title and method framing.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited method is explicitly an auto-encoding variational Bayes framework.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Autoencoders, ELBO & variational objectives.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: Variational autoencoders extends or specializes the architecture family Autoencoders.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Kingma & Welling 2013; Deep Learning autoencoder chapter.
sentence_reviews.notes: The canonical paper explicitly frames the method as variational auto-encoding.

sentence_reviews.text: Variational autoencoders is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Reparameterization & differentiable sampling.
sentence_reviews.notes: The paper's reparameterization estimator is directly used to optimize stochastic latent-variable models.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Variational autoencoders is modeled as depending on Autoencoders, ELBO & variational objectives and feeding downstream nodes such as Drug discovery, protein & molecular design.
